Off Calendar May-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FOLK LOOK, INC.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS GRANTED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)

For An Order Releasing Funds From Escrow To Pay Creditors; Memorandum Of P/A; Declaration Of Travis Reynolds In Support Thereof; (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Folk Look, Inc.'s Motion For An Order Releasing Funds From Escrow To Pay Creditors is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Edward Hung, Esq. for Plaintiff: Folk Look, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Kwan Yin Li, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Gini Leong, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: De Cong Zheng ind & dba Folk Look Buffet.
Matter is taken under submission for review.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment with the break down of Damages and Costs.

4-13-07 2:00 P.M.
Proposed Judgment and copy of financial statement rec'd in court.
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $35,207.74
Punitive Damages $70,000.00
Attorney Fees $5,000.00
Costs $635.00.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Continued To May-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
